modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook 365 not receiving new emails.

full_description_text:
- I am unable to receive any new emails in Outlook 365.  
- The application keeps showing a message saying "Trying to connect..."  
- This issue started suddenly, and I haven't changed any settings.  
- I rely on Outlook for my daily communications, so this is quite frustrating.
description:

- I rely on Outlook for my daily communications, so this is quite frustrating.
